parser_claim: Cantonese deictic 嚟/去 and several nondeictic directional verbs may independently predicate a path event.
source_proposition: The article treats 嚟, 去, 上, 落, 出, 入, 過, 開, 埋, 返, and 起 as a closed directional-verb inventory and gives independent-predicate examples such as 嚟廣州, 去北京, 上/落咗樓, 入咗房, and 返香港.
implementation_effect: Retain independently licensed one-word path predicates and preserve their overt goal and deictic orientation.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every listed lexeme has identical argument structure, frequency, or productivity; the source itself notes disagreement over 到 and restrictions on 起.

parser_claim: Direction plus deictic sequences such as 上嚟/去 and 返嚟/去 are attested path expressions, but their internal structure need not be an atomic compound.
source_proposition: The article lists direction-plus-deixis sequences and shows that aspect or arguments may intervene in some uses, arguing for a relatively loose verbal phrase rather than a uniformly tight word.
implementation_effect: Preserve component spans and allow construction-specific internal separation rather than flattening every sequence into one lexical item.
forbidden_inference: Do not generalize one fixed constituency or allow arbitrary material between every direction and deictic element.

parser_claim: The same directional lexemes may occur as predicates or after another verb, with distinct self-motion and caused-motion argument structures.
source_proposition: Yiu contrasts independent predicates such as 落咗樓下, 去咗辦公室, and 嚟咗辦公室 with postverbal uses after manner or caused-motion predicates, and distinguishes come/go deixis.
implementation_effect: Represent independent predicates, postverbal directional material, self-motion, and caused motion as separate profiles under a neutral umbrella if necessary.
forbidden_inference: Do not use the surface presence of 嚟/去 to assign one uniform predicate/complement role or one argument structure.

parser_claim: Standalone 走 can be a single motion predicate, but that does not establish membership in the same directional-sequence construction as 上嚟 or 返去.
source_proposition: The article separately lists single-verb motion encoding, including 架車走咗, from serial/path-verb and resultative encoding.
implementation_effect: Keep standalone 走 as an independently licensed motion predicate and avoid using DirectionalMotionVP ownership as a language-classification claim.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that all general motion verbs are directional particles or members of the closed directional-verb inventory.

parser_claim: The current runtime node conflates independent path predicates, direction-plus-deixis sequences, manner-plus-direction chains, and postverbal directional subspans.
source_proposition: Runtime extraction shows one label assigned to 嚟/去/走, 落嚟/返去, 行入嚟/行返過嚟, and the 返嚟 subspan in 攞…返嚟.
implementation_effect: Retain behavior frozen but split parser-facing claims by predicate status, manner composition, caused motion, and directional-complement status before any implementation change.
forbidden_inference: Do not present one internal node as one externally established Cantonese construction.

parser_claim: Cantonese has tri-syllabic directional sequences formed with 返 plus a disyllabic direction-plus-deictic sequence.
exact_locator: book pp. 48-49; directional-particle inventory and examples
source_proposition: The monograph distinguishes simple, disyllabic compound, and tri-syllabic directionals, with tri-syllabic forms combining 返 with a disyllabic form; examples include 返上嚟/返上去.
implementation_effect: Retain an overt 返 + direction + 嚟/去 profile as a sourced surface family.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every 返 + directional sequence has identical constituency or that all combinations are equally productive.

parser_claim: A manner verb may precede a three-directional string such as 行返過嚟 or 跑返過嚟.
exact_locator: book pp. 42-45 / PDF pp. 59-63; directional sequence cases
source_proposition: The monograph describes postverbal directional strings of up to three directional verbs and gives 佢行返過嚟, with 返 first and 嚟/去 final in the three-member directional string.
implementation_effect: Keep the full manner-plus-return-path-deixis span visible and distinguish the manner verb from the directional string.
forbidden_inference: Do not classify the entire four-token predicate as a bare compound directional without recording the manner component.

parser_claim: 返 may precede a complex directional, but lexical and ordering asymmetries block a free combinatorial rule.
source_proposition: Yiu documents compound directionals, 返 combined before them, object-order differences, and asymmetries such as 起嚟 versus 落去.
implementation_effect: Require attested marker order and construction-specific lexical profiles in any future remediation.
forbidden_inference: Do not generate arbitrary return + direction + deictic strings or assume all directionals share the same potential and object behavior.

parser_claim: The runtime boundary is internally inconsistent: 返上嚟 is CompoundDirectionalMotionVP, while 行返過嚟 is assigned DirectionalMotionVP rather than a manner-plus-compound analysis.
source_proposition: The current label is exercised only for the three-token 返上嚟 template, while the more complex accepted surface is routed to a different umbrella node.
implementation_effect: Realign future representation around overt components and sourced subtypes; do not change behavior in this checkpoint.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat current node assignment as evidence for a Cantonese grammatical boundary.

parser_claim: A manner verb followed by directional material can express self-motion and license a location or deictic endpoint.
source_proposition: Examples include 跑落樓下, 跑落去/嚟, 跑去辦公室, and 跑嚟辦公室; the directional element, not the manner verb alone, introduces the place relation.
implementation_effect: Retain narrowly scoped manner + postverbal directional profiles with overt argument and deictic structure.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that any action verb plus place is directed motion or that manner verbs independently license every goal.

parser_claim: Manner plus complex path/deixis sequences are attested as a distinct motion-event encoding pattern.
source_proposition: The article gives 行埋嚟呢度, 爬緊返去海邊, 跌咗落嚟, and 漏曬出嚟 and analyzes the complex path expression as one path component relative to the manner verb.
implementation_effect: Support overt manner + complex path profiles while preserving aspect and place positions.
forbidden_inference: Do not import the article’s serial-verb ontology as settled parser truth or collapse self-motion and caused motion.

parser_claim: Preverbal 向 + ground before 行 is a coverb/orientation phrase composed with a manner-motion predicate, not the same postverbal directional configuration.
exact_locator: PDF pp. 1-2 and 20; coverb inventory and table 37
source_proposition: The qualifying paper places directional 向 coverb phrases before the main verb and distinguishes them from directional main predicates.
implementation_effect: Split the current preverbal PathPhrase + 行 branch from postverbal manner-directional construction claims.
forbidden_inference: Do not use the English umbrella directed manner motion to erase coverb phrase order and relation type.

parser_claim: Self-motion and caused-motion uses with directional material have different participant structures.
source_proposition: Yiu explicitly contrasts self-motion examples with caused-motion examples in which an agent causes another entity to move.
implementation_effect: Preserve mover/theme and causer roles and keep caused-motion wrappers separate from self-motion manner predicates.
forbidden_inference: Do not assign the subject as mover in every verb-plus-directional string.

parser_claim: 返到 + place is attested with an arrival-at-goal interpretation.
source_proposition: 返到學校未呀你 is glossed as asking whether the addressee has arrived at school, and 到 is discussed in the resultative inventory.
implementation_effect: Retain the specific reviewed 返到 + overt place goal profile as a candidate spatial-attainment construction.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer a generic V + 到 + place rule from one example or erase the contribution of 返.

parser_claim: Main-verb 到 arrival must be distinguished from postverbal 到 expressing a spatial result or attainment.
source_proposition: The article excludes 到 from its directional-verb inventory while recognizing it as an arrival verb, and separately analyzes 我爬到咗山頂 as a resultative motion construction.
implementation_effect: Keep main arrival 到 and postverbal attainment 到 in separate parser-facing claims.
forbidden_inference: Do not classify every 到 as a directional component or every postverbal 到 as spatial.

parser_claim: Aspect placement can distinguish a manner/path sequence from a more tightly bound resultative V-到 construction in one published analysis.
source_proposition: The article uses whether aspect occurs between or after the verbs as a diagnostic and gives 我爬到咗山頂 for resultative goal attainment.
implementation_effect: Record visible aspect position and retain theory-neutral result/attainment metadata.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat this diagnostic as universally decisive or force all sources into the article’s serial-versus-resultative theory.

parser_claim: The current runtime profile covers only 返/行 + 到 + overt goal and should not be promoted as a productive lexical class without verb-by-verb and nonspatial boundaries.
exact_locator: main.js Lane 09 spatial fallback; grammar-legitimacy audit row GoalAttainmentMotionVP
source_proposition: Runtime extraction shows a narrow hard-coded profile and only two accepted fixtures, while 到 has main-verb, resultative, extent, and ability-related homographs or functions elsewhere.
implementation_effect: Keep the current behavior frozen and require explicit verb inventory, spatial-goal diagnostics, and negative boundaries before remediation.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every V到place string is spatial attainment or that fixture success establishes productivity.

parser_claim: 唔, 未, 咪, and 冇 are preverbal negation adverbs that can negate a following VP; directional predicates do not require a special language-level negation construction.
source_proposition: The monograph treats these forms as a closed set of negation adverbs preceding and negating an adjective phrase or verb phrase.
implementation_effect: Represent ordinary negative directional clauses through general negation composition while preserving the lexical negator.
forbidden_inference: Do not promote m4 + directional VP as a distinct Cantonese construction or normalize 冇/未/咪 to 唔.

parser_claim: Postverbal potential V-唔-directional is structurally distinct from ordinary preverbal VP negation and is lexically restricted.
source_proposition: Yiu documents forms such as 行得/唔落去 and 行得/唔入嚟, while showing that 起嚟 and aspectualized uses have different or blocked potential behavior.
implementation_effect: Keep NegativePotentialDirectionalVP separate from ordinary pre-V negation and require construction-specific lexical licensing.
forbidden_inference: Do not parse V唔directional as simple NegatedDirectionalMotionVP or assume every directional/aspectual form enters the potential construction.

parser_claim: An empirical Cantonese coding scheme separately records preverbal negation, directional particles, and postverbal potential patterns.
exact_locator: Appendix S1, Table S1, structures 11, 15, and 16
source_proposition: Negation is coded [NegAdv-V], directionals as [V-DirPart], and potential as [V-得/唔-Part] or related orders.
implementation_effect: Use the separation as corroboration for parser layer boundaries, not as proof of a complete grammar.
forbidden_inference: Do not count this adapted coding scheme as an independent productivity source or collapse its descriptive categories with Canto Span nodes.

parser_claim: The runtime node is a composition wrapper, and its slot template incorrectly names only m4 even though accepted paths also include 冇去.
exact_locator: main.js lines 2586-2596; grammar-legitimacy audit and native-screen rows CS160-N107 to CS160-N110
source_proposition: The declared template is m4_negator + directional_motion_vp, while accepted evidence includes both 唔 and 冇 directional predicates.
implementation_effect: Retain a neutral internal negative-VP wrapper only if useful, preserve negator identity, and retire the node as a standalone Cantonese-language claim.
forbidden_inference: Do not relabel 冇 as m4 or use one template name to assert that all negators are grammatically interchangeable.
